label: P-4
stance: Extend synthesis_points.kind enum with fourth value 'counterfactual' — minimum-mechanism graduation that homes the row in the table whose purpose is queryable stance-space inventory.
body_md:
**Position.** Extend `synthesis_points.kind` enum with a fourth value `counterfactual` alongside `convergence | divergence | minority`; counterfactuals are the fourth shape of stance — a position no perspective took — and the kernel already has the typed primitive for stance-space inventory at deliberation-seal.

**Schema sketch.**
- Migration 040 rebuilds `synthesis_points` (SQLite cannot ALTER a CHECK in place) widening the kind CHECK to admit `('convergence','divergence','minority','counterfactual')` with FK + T-14 convergence-arity CHECK preserved verbatim per the migration 039 trigger-drop-rebuild-recreate template.
- Add nullable column `disposition_kind` TEXT CHECK (disposition_kind IS NULL OR disposition_kind IN ('addressed-in-synthesis','deferred-to-FR','nilled-by-exclusion')) with table-level CHECK (kind <> 'counterfactual' OR disposition_kind IS NOT NULL) so dispositions are substrate-derivable not narrated.
- Add nullable column `disposition_target` TEXT carrying FR alias when disposition_kind='deferred-to-FR' or exclusion-name when 'nilled-by-exclusion' (free text for 'addressed-in-synthesis' synthesis_md anchor); kept text not FK because FR aliases are not in `objects` at engine-v49 per §5 cite-typing.
- Counterfactual rows set `source_perspectives='[]'` — that empty-array IS the semantic marker (no perspective took the stance) and rides existing T-14 CHECK which only constrains convergence-arity not the inverse.
- Handler dispatch order in `_submit_synthesis_point`: existing FK + sealed + closed-session checks unchanged; new branch when kind='counterfactual' validates disposition_kind present + source_perspectives empty + label format `X-N` (X-prefix reserved); receipt-pattern shape preserved (row + object link + refs).

**CLI surface.**
- Existing `bin/selvedge submit synthesis-point` admits `kind='counterfactual'` with new optional `disposition_kind` + `disposition_target` payload fields — no new submit kind, no new subcommand, no new flag; `_schemas.py` synthesis-point entry updates the kind enum string and adds the two optional atoms.
- Convention: counterfactual labels use prefix `X-N` (eXcluded-stance) parallel to existing `C-N`/`D-N`/`M-N` so future query `SELECT label FROM synthesis_points WHERE deliberation_id=?` returns the full stance-space inventory in one read.
- `bin/selvedge schema synthesis_points` and `bin/selvedge orient` packets surface the fourth kind automatically since both already enumerate the CHECK enum dynamically.

**Migration path.**
- Step 1 ships migration 040-synthesis-points-counterfactual-kind.sql under T-15-CALIBRATED block: PRAGMA foreign_keys=OFF, drop the 2 t06_synpoints triggers, rebuild table widening kind CHECK + adding two nullable columns + adding counterfactual-requires-disposition CHECK, INSERT … SELECT, RENAME, recreate triggers verbatim, schema_migrations row, PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON.
- Step 2 updates `selvedge/submit/_schemas.py` synthesis-point kind enum string + optional atoms list and `selvedge/submit/deliberation.py` _submit_synthesis_point with disposition column wiring + counterfactual branch validation.
- Step 3 deletes `prompts/development.md` §Seal-time deliberation-grading clause (lines ~94-126) and amends §4 line 85 example to admit the fourth kind; deletes `methodology.md` §Synthesis line 101 prefix-prose pointer and gains one sentence under Dissent preservation naming counterfactual as the fourth kind.
- Step 4 backfills 8 historical seal-grade engine_feedback rows by authoring synthesis_point counterfactual rows against their deliberations (post-hoc structural conversion, body_md preserved as audit trail) — optional follow-up FR not blocking adoption.

**What not.**
- No new table — categorical fragmentation across `synthesis_points` + `deliberation_counterfactuals` would force future stance-space readers to UNION two homes, defeating the queryable-inventory purpose the existing primitive already serves.
- No new submit kind — `submit synthesis-point` already carries the deliberation_id FK, label, summary, source_perspectives, body_md slots that a counterfactual needs; a parallel kind would duplicate the handler.
- No T-NN gate on deliberation-seal at engine-v50 — the v2 promotion path from DV-S159-1 (gate-on-recurrence) is preserved; this proposal graduates the storage shape not the mandatoriness, leaving operator/agent-policed authoring intact under §1 + §6 ceremony-drift defense.
- No backfill blocking — historical 8 seal-grade engine_feedback rows can convert post-hoc via FR; the migration does not require deletion of the engine_feedback originals to ship.

**Open questions.**
- Should source_perspectives='[]' be enforced via CHECK when kind='counterfactual', or admitted as `null` semantically — the table currently has NOT NULL on source_perspectives so empty-array is the only honest encoding.
- Whether the X-N label prefix lands as a CHECK constraint or as handler-side validation only — handler-side preserves flexibility for future stance shapes without migration churn.
- Whether `disposition_target` deserves typed split (separate `disposition_fr_alias` + `disposition_exclusion_kind` columns) at v1 or remains free text until a calibration-EF surfaces query pressure.

**Risks.**
- False-positive shape: synthesizer mislabels a divergence-perspective claim as counterfactual — recovery is calibration-EF or supersession by next session, identical shape to existing convergence/divergence/minority mislabels which the kernel already tolerates without gate.
- Empty source_perspectives mis-set on a true divergence row — handler-side validation can refuse `kind IN ('divergence','minority') AND source_perspectives='[]'` as a guard; low cost since dissent rows by definition cite a perspective.
- Disposition CHECK refusal at submit when disposition_kind missing — refusal text names the four-value disposition enum and exits with non-zero; recovery is one retry with the field populated, matching T-14 convergence-arity refusal ergonomics.
- Categorical-coherence overreach: if future research surfaces a fifth shape of stance (e.g. 'speculative') the enum extends again — but enum-widening is non-destructive and the migration 040 template carries forward.

**What lost.**
- The flexibility to author a free-form prefix-prose row capturing arbitrary seal-time observations is forfeit for counterfactuals specifically — future seal-time observations that are NOT counterfactuals continue using `engine_feedback` flag='observation' as before.
- The structural argument that engine_feedback is the universal observation surface loses one tenant — but DV-S109-1 ceremony-subtraction is honoured by reusing an existing primitive (synthesis_points), not by adding one.
- Against P-1 typed-table: a separate `deliberation_counterfactuals` would provide stricter disposition enum + dedicated T-NN gate but at cost of fragmenting stance-space across two homes; the categorical-coherence loss outweighs the marginal gate-strictness gain when synthesis_points already carries deliberation_id FK + label + summary + body_md.
- Against P-3 ship-nothing: enum-extension preserves the substrate-derivable disposition + the queryable stance-space inventory + the FK-to-deliberation traceability that subtract loses; the prose-clause-without-substrate failure mode at #1 remains under subtract.
- Failure-mode coverage: defends fully against #1 (typed home, no catch-all collapse) + #3 (kind enum distinguishes counterfactual from observation) + #4 (count is `SELECT count(*) FROM synthesis_points WHERE deliberation_id=? AND kind='counterfactual'`) + #5 (no new mechanism, semantic capacity added to existing); partial defense on #2 (still anchors on synthesis_points precedent but the precedent is the categorically-correct one) + #6 (zero-with-named-exclusion remains operator-policed since no T-NN gate, residual ceremony-drift risk under operator-policed mandate).
